Meaning: The name of the specific original file or system from which the row was extracted (annual_deliberation_y1; anonymized_attendance_tp_emd; final_students_scores; or ensia_performance_prediction).
Anonymous identifier specific to each source registry used to reference students safely.
Academic level or year group assignment (e.g. Y1; Y2; or Unknown).
Overall academic year performance evaluation score mapped on a standard /20 scale.
Calculated academic average specific to the first semester term (out of 20).
Calculated academic average specific to the second semester term (out of 20).
The mathematical mean of individual courses/modules mapped to a standard /20 scale.
Standard deviation of individual course marks; tracks performance volatility across subjects.
Minimum module grade recorded for the student within that term window.
Maximum module grade recorded for the student within that term window.
Total count of active modules or course grades mapped for the student record row.
Estimated number of modules that fell strictly below the passing threshold of 10/20. (Only exists in Core dataset).
The ratio of courses with scores below 10/20 relative to the total active course count.
Proportion of modules where the student achieved high proficiency benchmarks (>= 14/20).
Proportion of critical underperformance fields falling short of baseline metrics (< 8/20).
A specialized scale where 1 indicates absolute uniform marks and decreasing values point to higher inter-course grade discrepancies.
Calculated probability indicator measuring historical metrics (weak mean averages; high failure shares; and extreme performance volatility).
Total tally of attribute metrics missing from original source file processing.
Granular counter of targeted core analysis metrics missing prior to running replacement routines. (Only exists in Core dataset).
Boolean toggle flag flagging whether core feature records required synthetic backfilling to run modeling. (Only exists in Core dataset).
